change.description: Promote row-aware batch-GEMV full-attention O to the rows=2 default correctness path, retaining --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path native as an explicit native-O diagnostic.
change.new_default: rows=2 full-attention output path batch_gemv_auto unless native/per_row/batch_gemv is explicitly forced

default_batch_output_runs.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture benchmarks/results/2026-06-04-hipengine-qwen35-retained-c8-rowchunk2-pair-native-o-isolation-254/qwen36_paro_rows0_1_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --batch-decode-full-attn-path native_batch --batch-decode-full-attn-row-chunk-size 0 --batch-decode-moe-path grouped_compact --batch-decode-linear-output-path batch_gemv --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path batch --batch-sample-mode serial_lm_head --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json benchmarks/results/2026-06-04-hipengine-qwen35-retained-c2-auto-gemv-o-default-255/rows0_1_batch_c2.json
default_batch_output_runs.label: rows0_1_batch_c2

findings: With the new rows=2 default, every compact original-c8 row pair is generated-token green at [137,137] under --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path batch and records first full-attention output path batch_gemv_auto.
The explicit native diagnostic preserves the failure signal: rows0..1 are green but rows2..3, rows4..5, and rows6..7 are red at [137,118], [45,0], and [68,137].
This eliminates the focused c2 full-attention O blocker for the prompt-pair set without a per-run batch_gemv diagnostic flag; no throughput claim is made.

guard.command: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
guard.pytest: targeted tests passed after updating row=2 auto-GEMV O expectations

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: the c2 output blocker is green by default for all compact prompt pairs ([137,137] each) with batch_gemv_auto, while the explicit native diagnostic remains red for the previously failing pairs. Active c2 verify is still 137. No throughput claim.
